Companies ## One web scraping API. Infinite use cases. Scrape any URL, crawl an entire website, and extract structured data in seconds: markdown, HTML, sitemaps, screenshots, and brand intelligence. Extract web content Scrape any URL, or crawl an entire site, for clean markdown, rendered HTML, or extracted images. Extract site map Crawl and discover all page URLs from any domain via sitemap. Retrieve brand data Get logos, colors, and metadata by domain, email, name, or stock ticker. Extract styleguide Get the complete visual identity: colors, elements, and fonts from any website. AI Query Use AI to extract custom data from any website with structured output. Get products Extract product listings or individual product details with AI. Capture screenshots Generate high-quality viewport or full-page screenshots of any website. Identify transaction Match transaction strings to brands with optional location and MCC hints. ![](https://www.context.dev/hero-glass-texture.webp) Extract web content [Try in Cursor](https://cursor.com/link/prompt?text=Please%20create%20a%20extract%20web%20content%20implementation%20using%20the%20context.dev%20SDK%20like%20this%3A%0A%0Aimport%20ContextDev%20from%20%27context.dev%27%3B%0A%0Aconst%20client%20%3D%20new%20ContextDev(%7B%20apiKey%3A%20process.env%5B%27CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY%27%5D%20%7D)%3B%0A%0A%2F%2F%20Crawl%20an%20entire%20site%20%E2%86%92%20markdown%20for%20every%20page%0Aconst%20%7B%20results%2C%20metadata%20%7D%20%3D%20await%20client.web.webCrawlMd(%7B%0A%20%20url%3A%20%27https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.stripe.com%27%2C%0A%20%20maxPages%3A%2050%2C%0A%20%20maxDepth%3A%203%2C%0A%20%20useMainContentOnly%3A%20true%0A%7D)%3B%0A%0A%2F%2F%20Get%20clean%20markdown%20from%20any%20page%0Aconst%20%7B%20markdown%20%7D%20%3D%20await%20client.web.webScrapeMd(%7B%0A%20%20url%3A%20%27https%3A%2F%2Fopenai.com%2Fpricing%27%0A%7D)%3B%0A%0A%2F%2F%20Get%20fully%20rendered%20HTML%20(JS%20executed)%0Aconst%20%7B%20html%20%7D%20%3D%20await%20client.web.webScrapeHTML(%7B%0A%20%20url%3A%20%27https%3A%2F%2Freact.dev%2Flearn%27%0A%7D)%3B%0A%0A%2F%2F%20Extract%20all%20images%20from%20a%20page%0Aconst%20%7B%20images%20%7D%20%3D%20await%20client.web.webScrapeImages(%7B%0A%20%20url%3A%20%27https%3A%2F%2Fdribbble.com%2Fshots%2Fpopular%27%0A%7D)%3B%0A%0AAPI%20reference%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.context.dev%2Fapi-reference%2Fweb-scraping%2Fscrape-url-and-convert-to-markdown) ``` import ContextDev from 'context.dev'; const client = new ContextDev({ apiKey: process.env['CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY'] }); // Crawl an entire site → markdown for every page const { results, metadata } = await client.web.webCrawlMd({ url: 'https://docs.stripe.com', maxPages: 50, maxDepth: 3, useMainContentOnly: true }); // Get clean markdown from any page const { markdown } = await client.web.webScrapeMd({ url: 'https://openai.com/pricing' }); // Get fully rendered HTML (JS executed) const { html } = await client.web.webScrapeHTML({ url: 'https://react.dev/learn' }); // Extract all images from a page const { images } = await client.web.webScrapeImages({ url: 'https://dribbble.com/shots/popular' }); ``` Connect Your Agent To The Web ## From web scraping to brand extraction in one API. A scrape API, a crawl API, an AI extraction API, and a brand intelligence API, all the same endpoint. Here's what your agent can do now. ### Read the web, live Give an agent real-time access to any page. Scrape to markdown, render JS, extract images, so the agent reasons over the current web, not a frozen snapshot. Agent: I need to check their pricing page. Request GET /v1/scrape/markdown { url: "vercel.com/pricing" } Response · Markdown247ms # Vercel Pricing Develop. Preview. Ship. Start free and scale to the enterprise. ## Hobby $0/mo For personal projects and experiments. ## Pro $20/mo For teams building production apps. Agent: Their Pro plan is $20/mo, includes... ### Ground RAG in fresh content Keep your retrieval index current. Crawl a sitemap, convert every page to clean markdown, and pipe it straight into embeddings, with no brittle parsers in between. acme.com/docs/api/auth acme.com/blog/release-v3 acme.com/pricing acme.com/changelog acme.com/docs/sdk markdown + embed Knowledge Base5 docs indexed ### Run deep research on demand Answer "tell me about this company" with actual sources. Resolve a domain to a typed profile, then expand with custom AI queries pulled from the live site. Input notion.com ? No data Enriched ![Notion brand backdrop image extracted via the Context.dev brand data API](https://media.brand.dev/d1d75039-9f70-4104-9ddd-d299eff8f9c5.png) ![Notion](https://media.brand.dev/571194da-8219-49f1-a82e-d9dde32b8d06.png) Notion San Francisco, CA IndustrySoftware (B2B) Employees~1,000 Revenue$600M ARR Founded2013 Valuation$11B xlinkedinig ### Personalize onboarding in a call Make a new user feel seen from sign-up. One domain → company name, logo, colors, industry, auto-filled before they tab away. linear.app Auto-fill Company Name Linear Industry Developer Tools Brand Color #5E6AD2 Description Issue tracking for modern teams Logo ![linear.app](https://logos.context.dev/?publicClientId=brandLL_QObZ4OkTQJ0q1toWsQO9tXq8AzKlNdz4&domain=linear.app)linear-logo.svg ### Enrich any entity your agent sees Turn the references in your prompts into structured data. One call hydrates a company reference with logos, colors, industry, socials, and firmographics. ![Y Combinator brand backdrop image enriched via the Context.dev company data API](https://media.brand.dev/720a6c50-1823-4756-9fb2-7429d0b3bfcb.png) ![Y Combinator](https://media.brand.dev/46e88bf5-011d-4d9d-a801-692719d886fa.jpg) Y Combinator ycombinator.com Startup accelerator investing $500K in early-stage companies. IndustryInvestment & WealthTech SloganFunding the future Founded2005 LocationSan Francisco, CA xlinkedinyoutube ### Make sense of transaction noise Resolve "SQ \*BLUE BOTTLE 8xx" into Blue Bottle Coffee. Identify the brand, attach visuals and metadata, hand the agent something it can actually act on. AMZN MKTP US\*2K8F7G1 ![amazon.com](https://logos.context.dev/?publicClientId=brandLL_QObZ4OkTQJ0q1toWsQO9tXq8AzKlNdz4&domain=amazon.com) Amazon E-commerce SQ \*BLUE BOTTLE COF ![bluebottlecoffee.com](https://logos.context.dev/?publicClientId=brandLL_QObZ4OkTQJ0q1toWsQO9tXq8AzKlNdz4&domain=bluebottlecoffee.com) Blue Bottle Food & Drink GITHUB.COM 2FA8X91 ![github.com](https://logos.context.dev/?publicClientId=brandLL_QObZ4OkTQJ0q1toWsQO9tXq8AzKlNdz4&domain=github.com) GitHub Developer Tools The Problem ## Why agents need a web scraping API. Most agent failures aren’t reasoning failures. They’re context failures. The agent couldn’t scrape the page, crawl the site, or extract the data, in the right shape, at the right time. 1. 01 ### Training data is frozen. Your model knows the web as of some cutoff. The page your user is asking about is newer than that, every time. You need a live web scraping API, not a snapshot. 2. 02 ### Generic scrapers return noise. Raw HTML with nav, ads, and boilerplate forces your agent to guess. A purpose-built scraping API converts any URL to clean markdown, so tokens get spent on signal, not chrome. 3. 03 ### Entities need structure, not prose. An agent asked about a company shouldn't have to crawl, scrape, and parse a marketing site. It needs typed structured data like logos, colors, industry, and socials, extracted on demand. One platform · three surfaces ## Scrape any URL. Crawl any site. Extract any data point. Web scraping to clean markdown, structured data extraction with AI, typed brand intelligence on any company, and a one-line logo embed, all from the same REST API. [Web scraping API](https://www.context.dev/data/web-scrape-markdown-api)·[Crawl website API](https://www.context.dev/data/crawl-website-api)·[HTML scraping API](https://www.context.dev/data/web-scrape-html-api)·[Sitemap crawler](https://www.context.dev/data/web-scrape-sitemap-api)·[Image scraper API](https://www.context.dev/data/web-scrape-images-api)·[Screenshot API](https://www.context.dev/data/screenshot-api)·[Logo API](https://www.context.dev/data/logo-api)·[Brand colors API](https://www.context.dev/data/company-colors-api)·[Styleguide API](https://www.context.dev/data/company-styleguide-api)·[Font API](https://www.context.dev/data/font-api) Web Extraction ### Read the live web as markdown. Clean, LLM-ready markdown from any URL, with crawl, sitemap, AI extraction, and product pipelines on the same primitive. https://openai.com/pricing Request ``` await client.web.webScrapeMd({ url: 'https://openai.com/pricing' }) ``` Response · markdown247ms # OpenAI Pricing Simple, predictable pricing across models. ## GPT-5 $10/1M Most capable model for complex tasks. ## GPT-5 mini $0.5/1M Fast and affordable for most tasks. \- Context window: 400k tokens Brand Intelligence ### Any domain, typed. Resolve a domain, email, ticker, or messy merchant descriptor into a typed company with logos, colors, fonts, and firmographics. ![Linear](https://logos.context.dev/?publicClientId=brandLL_QObZ4OkTQJ0q1toWsQO9tXq8AzKlNdz4&domain=linear.app&format=png&size=128) Linear linear.app Purpose-built issue tracking and project planning for modern software teams. IndustryDeveloper Tools SloganBuilt for modern teams Founded2019 LocationSan Francisco, CA xlinkedingithub Logo Link ### One `` tag. Any logo. No API call. No SDK. No backend. Just an image URL, with logos served from a global CDN in ~20ms. with brand data. [![The Hidden Race Condition in file-type That Corrupted Our Parallel Image Detection](https://www.context.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Ffile-type-race-condition.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_ADPCm8CpD6YH4rLfxUteXrfu2Xku)\\ \\ May 4, 2026 **The Hidden Race Condition in file-type That Corrupted Our Parallel Image Detection** \\ \\ Our logo candidate list kept shrinking at random. We traced it to the file-type npm package, which shares internal state across detections and returns mismatched MIME types when called in parallel.\\ \\ Read more](https://www.context.dev/blog/file-type-npm-stateful-race-condition-parallel-image-detection) [![We are Context.dev, not Context.ai](https://www.context.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Frebrand-image.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_ADPCm8CpD6YH4rLfxUteXrfu2Xku)\\ \\ Apr 19, 2026 **We are Context.dev, not Context.ai** \\ \\ A quick note to our customers: Context.dev has no affiliation with Context.ai, the AI platform named in the recent Vercel security incident.\\ \\ Read more](https://www.context.dev/blog/we-are-context-dev-not-context-ai) [![Company Logo API Comparison 2026: Context.dev vs Logo.dev vs Brandfetch](https://www.context.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Fcompany-logo-api-comparison-26.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_ADPCm8CpD6YH4rLfxUteXrfu2Xku)\\ \\ Apr 7, 2026 **Company Logo API Comparison 2026: Context.dev vs Logo.dev vs Brandfetch** \\ \\ A detailed comparison of the top company logo APIs in 2026. We break down Context.dev, Logo.dev, and Brandfetch across pricing, data quality, features, and developer experience.\\ \\ Read more](https://www.context.dev/blog/company-logo-api-comparison) [![How to Extract Raw HTML from Any URL with a Single API Call](https://www.context.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Fhow-to-extract-raw-html-blog-post.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_ADPCm8CpD6YH4rLfxUteXrfu2Xku)\\ \\ Apr 5, 2026 **How to Extract Raw HTML from Any URL with a Single API Call** \\ \\ Learn how to extract raw HTML from any URL using a simple API call. Compare DIY scraping pitfalls with managed solutions and get working code examples in cURL, Python, JavaScript, and TypeScript.\\ \\ Read more](https://www.context.dev/blog/how-to-extract-raw-html-from-any-url-with-a-single-api-call) [![How to Reverse Engineer Any Website's Design System](https://www.context.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Fhow-to-reverse-engineer-any-websites-design-system.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_ADPCm8CpD6YH4rLfxUteXrfu2Xku)\\ \\ Apr 4, 2026 **How to Reverse Engineer Any Website's Design System** \\ \\ Extracting a design system used to mean days of inspecting elements and copying CSS by hand. A single API call now returns colors, typography, spacing, and component styles as structured JSON.\\ \\ Read more](https://www.context.dev/blog/how-to-reverse-engineer-any-websites-design-system) [![Building an AI Web Research Agent: Web Scraping to Markdown to LLM in 10 Lines of Code](https://www.context.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Fbuilding-an-ai-web-research-agent.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_ADPCm8CpD6YH4rLfxUteXrfu2Xku)\\ \\ Apr 1, 2026 **Building an AI Web Research Agent: Web Scraping to Markdown to LLM in 10 Lines of Code** \\ \\ Learn how to build an AI web research agent that scrapes live websites, converts them to Markdown, and feeds the content to an LLM — all in under 10 lines of code. A practical tutorial for developers building AI agent pipelines.\\ \\ Read more](https://www.context.dev/blog/building-an-ai-web-research-agent) [![How to Discover Every URL on Any Domain (3 Methods Compared)](https://www.context.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Fhow-to-discover-every-url-on-any-domain.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_ADPCm8CpD6YH4rLfxUteXrfu2Xku)\\ \\ Mar 30, 2026 **How to Discover Every URL on Any Domain (3 Methods Compared)** \\ \\ Compare three methods for discovering all pages on a website - manual crawling, sitemap parsing, and API-based discovery - and find out which approach actually scales.\\ \\ Read more](https://www.context.dev/blog/how-to-discover-every-url-on-any-domain-3-methods-compared) [![Competitive intelligence pricing: models, costs, and ROI](https://www.context.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Fcompetitive-intelligence-pricing.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_ADPCm8CpD6YH4rLfxUteXrfu2Xku)\\ \\ Mar 29, 2026 **Competitive intelligence pricing: models, costs, and ROI** \\ \\ What competitive intelligence actually costs, how the three main pricing models work, and how to figure out if you're getting a good deal.\\ \\ Read more](https://www.context.dev/blog/competitive-intelligence-pricing) [![Clearbit Logo API Is Dead: The 2026 Migration Guide for Developers](https://www.context.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Fclearbit-logo-api-migration-2026.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_ADPCm8CpD6YH4rLfxUteXrfu2Xku)\\ \\ Mar 28, 2026 **Clearbit Logo API Is Dead: The 2026 Migration Guide for Developers** \\ \\ The Clearbit Logo API shut down in December 2025. This is the definitive 2026 guide to migrating your logo integration, with code samples, alternative comparisons, and why Logo Link by Context.dev is the best replacement.\\ \\ Read more](https://www.context.dev/blog/clearbit-logo-api-dead-2026-migration-guide) [![XML Sitemap Parsing at Scale: From 100 to 100,000 URLs](https://www.context.dev/_next/image?url=%2Fblog%2Fxml-sitemap-parsing-at-scale.png&w=3840&q=75&dpl=dpl_ADPCm8CpD6YH4rLfxUteXrfu2Xku)\\ \\ Mar 28, 2026 **XML Sitemap Parsing at Scale: From 100 to 100,000 URLs** \\ \\ How to build a reliable XML sitemap parser that handles recursive indexes, gzip compression, malformed XML, and rate limiting, or skip the engineering entirely with an API.\\ \\ Read more](https://www.context.dev/blog/xml-sitemap-parsing-at-scale) FAQs ## Frequently asked questions Everything you need to know about integrating and scaling with context.dev. Is there a free tier? Yes, Context.dev offers a free tier with 500 API credits and 10K Logo Link requests to test out both services. How do API credits work? API credits are consumed whenever you call our endpoints. Brand API calls (logo retrieval, color extraction, font detection, brand profiles, prefetch) cost 10 credits per call. Web endpoints (scraping) cost 1 credit per call. Logo Link requests are counted separately and do not use your API credits. Do you offer discounts for startups or nonprofits? Yes! We offer a startup discount of up to 30% off for one year if you're still early-stage. Apply at [https://www.context.dev/startup-discount](https://www.context.dev/startup-discount) What happens when my API credits run out? Each plan includes a monthly API credit allowance that replenishes automatically at the start of each billing cycle. When your credits are depleted, API calls will return a 401 error. You can configure auto top-up in your dashboard settings to avoid interruptions. Logo Link has a separate quota and is not affected when API credits run out. Why am I getting timeout errors? First-time domain lookups may take 10-30 seconds as we crawl and process the website. For time-sensitive applications, use the Prefetch endpoint to request brand data in advance, increase your client-side timeout to at least 30 seconds, or implement async/polling patterns for batch operations. Approximately 70% of requests hit cached brands, which return much faster. Do you support subdomains? Yes, subdomains are fully supported. What SDKs are available? We provide official SDKs for TypeScript, Python, and Ruby. What's the difference between API credits and Logo Link? They are two separate products with separate quotas. API credits are used to call any endpoint — brand data, logos, colors, fonts, and web scraping. Logo Link is a simpler service that returns just the square logo via a direct URL for displaying in your app. Logo Link has no rate limits and much higher quotas, while API credits have rate limits (calls per second) that vary by plan. What pricing plans are available, and can I make one-time lookups instead of subscribing? Context.dev offers several pricing tiers including Starter, Pro, and Scale plans with monthly API credit allowances. We currently do not support one-time lookups, however you can contact us to discuss options for one-time projects at [hello@context.dev](mailto:hello@context.dev). Am I billed for failed requests? No. You are not billed for failed requests or requests where we are blocked (rarely happens). Credits are only consumed on successful responses. What are the rate limits, and how can I increase them? Rate limits apply only to API calls, not Logo Link. Rate limits vary by plan: Free tier has 1 call/second, Starter has 2 calls/second, Pro has 5 calls/second, and Scale has 20 calls/second. Logo Link has no rate limits. Contact us to discuss higher rate limits for your use case. How fresh is the brand data? How often is it updated? Cached brand data is refreshed quarterly by default. Any brand older than 3 months is completely re-fetched when requested via the API. You can request a manual refresh for specific domains using our brand update form at [https://www.context.dev/update](https://www.context.dev/update). Image/logo URLs are guaranteed to remain valid for up to 1 year. What if I need additional data points? We are constantly adding new data points to the API and have more data under the hood that we don't surface yet. If you need a specific data point, please contact us at [hello@context.dev](mailto:hello@context.dev) and we will be happy to surface it. Is there a free tier? Free tier, 10-minute integration, and the same API powering agents at Mintlify, daily.dev, and Propane. No credit card to start.
